title: CE split-vocabulary policy sweep
summary: Sweep forward/backward vocab split thresholds on additional vocab sizes and sequence lengths to decide whether 4096/16384 should remain the default.
success_gate: Either validate the current split defaults across the larger matrix or replace them with a measured improvement that preserves parity.

results.finding: Default splits are validated as generally better or equal across 8 matrix configurations
results.wins: Default wins 6/8 cases, alternative wins 2/8 cases
